title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Om Book Shop Capital India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Om Book Shop Capital India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Om Book Shop Capital India in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Om Book Shop Capital India:
Om Book Shop Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Book Shop Capital India!
